name: HTML to Elementor
description_en: Convert HTML+CSS (pasted, file, URL, or AI-generated) into Elementor JSON that imports cleanly into WordPress, correctly handling Elementor's non-obvious quirks—shared system-color globals, lazy-load backgrounds, row-container widths, and CSS cache flushing.
description_zh: 把 HTML+CSS(粘贴、文件、URL 或 AI 生成)转换为可干净导入 WordPress 的 Elementor JSON,并正确处理 Elementor 的隐性坑——共享系统色全局变量、懒加载背景、行容器宽度、CSS 缓存刷新。
long_en: Avoids the broken renders you get from hand-writing Elementor JSON, since the skill already encodes the quirks that make naive output import but display wrong.
long_zh: 避免手写 Elementor JSON 导致的渲染错误——这些「能导入却显示不对」的坑已被技能内置处理。
sec_note_en: Runs locally with Python (beautifulsoup4/tinycss2) to emit Elementor JSON; you import the result into your own WordPress site.
sec_note_zh: 用 Python(beautifulsoup4/tinycss2)在本地运行并产出 Elementor JSON;由你自行把结果导入你的 WordPress 站点。
